title: NEXUS CANONICAL MASTER BUILD SPEC — Benchmark Fixture

waves.name: Repo Layout + Scaffold
waves.description: Generate monorepo structure, workspace config, tsconfig, shared types, and dev tooling.

packets.goal: Scaffold monorepo with packages/, apps/, and root config
Define shared type contracts in packages/core-contracts/
Verify clean build from fresh clone

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Repo Layout + Scaffold" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: API + Data Schema
waves.description: Define all API route contracts, data model schemas, and database migrations.

packets.goal: Define canonical data model entities and relationships
Generate database migration files for all entities
Define all API route contracts with request/response/auth/error

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "API + Data Schema" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: DAS / IBC Spec Compiler
waves.description: Build the deterministic app spec compiler that converts raw input into DAS and IBC.

packets.goal: Implement spec extraction and normalization pipeline
Implement assumption ledger and blocked decision engine
Implement specHash determinism — same input produces same hash
Implement Immutable Build Contract generator

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "DAS / IBC Spec Compiler" would execute 4 packets

waves.name: Execution DAG + Runtime
waves.description: Build the job queue, worker system, packet execution, lease, and retry infrastructure.

packets.goal: Implement job queue with claim, lease, and retry semantics
Implement packet worker with execution and status reporting
Implement execution DAG — topological packet ordering

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Execution DAG + Runtime" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: Builder / Factory Engine
waves.description: Build the code synthesis engine that turns packets + blueprints into real working applications.

packets.goal: Implement blueprint registry with domain-specific generation rules
Implement real code synthesis — generate working TypeScript from blueprint + DAS
Implement workspace materializer with real file output
Prove generated app builds, runs, and passes /health smoke

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Builder / Factory Engine" would execute 4 packets

waves.name: Repair + Replay Engine
waves.description: Build the dirty-repo repair engine with diagnostics, patching, rollback, and replay.

packets.goal: Implement failure classifier for 5 known failure types
Implement deterministic patch engine with rollback snapshots
Implement repair replay with idempotency guarantee

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Repair + Replay Engine" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: State + Memory Engine
waves.description: Build the durable state substrate: persistent state objects, memory tiers, contradiction detection, and continuity guarantees.

packets.goal: Implement persistent state object schema with confidence, status, and conflict resolution
Implement memory tiers with durable storage and retrieval guarantees
Prove memory tier influences downstream decisions, not just retrieval

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "State + Memory Engine" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: Application Shell + Control Interface
waves.description: Build the application frontend shell with navigation, core pages, interactive components, and operator control interface.

packets.goal: Implement primary input interface with natural language and structured command support
Implement operational status pane showing current state, changes, and pending actions
Implement core deep surfaces (state view, execution view, builder view)

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Application Shell + Control Interface" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: Governance + Security
waves.description: Build RBAC, tenant isolation, approval tiers, secrets management, and autonomy policy.

packets.goal: Implement RBAC with role hierarchy and permission enforcement
Implement autonomy tier system with approval thresholds
Implement secrets management with no-log guarantee

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Governance + Security" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: Deployment + Rollback
waves.description: Build export, dry-run, live deploy, credential injection, and rollback engine.

packets.goal: Implement export bundle with all assets and credentials excluded
acceptanceCriteria: dry-run blocked from live deploy claim

packets.goal: Implement dry-run mode with explicit cannot-claim-live-deploy gate
acceptanceCriteria: dry-run blocked from live deploy claim

packets.goal: Implement live deployment pipeline with rollback checkpoint
acceptanceCriteria: dry-run blocked from live deploy claim
dry-run blocked from live deploy claim

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Deployment + Rollback" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: Validation + Proof System
waves.description: Build all validators, proof ladder, evidence artifacts, and claim boundaries.

packets.goal: Implement proof ladder with BUILD → TEST → SMOKE → DEPLOY chain
acceptanceCriteria: no validator passes on mock output

packets.goal: Implement claim boundary enforcement — no claim above evidence
acceptanceCriteria: no validator passes on mock output

packets.goal: Run validate:all and prove all validators pass deterministically
acceptanceCriteria: no validator passes on mock output
no validator passes on mock output

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Validation + Proof System" would execute 3 packets

waves.name: Fresh-Clone End-to-End Proof
waves.description: Prove the full system works from a clean checkout: install → build → test → run → smoke.

packets.goal: Run npm ci from clean state and verify all deps resolve
acceptanceCriteria: npm ci succeeds from clean checkout

packets.goal: Run full build and test suite and record evidence
acceptanceCriteria: npm ci succeeds from clean checkout

packets.goal: Run builder forensic smoke suite and prove PASS_REAL > 90%
acceptanceCriteria: npm ci succeeds from clean checkout
npm ci succeeds from clean checkout

evidence.detail: Dry-run: wave "Fresh-Clone End-to-End Proof" would execute 3 packets
